productDisplayName: Puma Men Top Flow Red-213 Black Watch
description: This watch from puma comes in a clean sleek design. This active watch is perfect for urban wear and can serve you well in the gym or a night of clubbing. Case diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: RectangleWarranty: 2 YearsPlastic case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort PU straps with a buckle clasp for comfort and style Black dial with cat logo on the strapDigital dial showing time, timer, alarm, chronograph and backlightQuartz movement of time display Acrylic dial window for scratch resistanceButtons on the sides to reset time and features Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters
